task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the UN system reference file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'un_system_reference.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the root node and 6 principal organs on Page 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas shows a 'United Nations' root node connected to 6 principal organ nodes: General Assembly, Security Council, Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC), International Court of Justice (ICJ), Secretariat, and Trusteeship Council.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the required subsidiary bodies under the principal organs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas shows at least 9 subsidiary bodies properly connected to their parent organs (e.g., 3 under General Assembly, 2 under Security Council, 2 under ECOSOC, 2 under Secretariat).

task_completion.description: Agent applies distinct color coding to the organ branches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nodes in the draw.io diagram are filled with at least 3 distinct colors to differentiate the branches of the principal organs.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a second page for Specialized Agencies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second page or tab in draw.io (e.g., 'Page 2' or 'Specialized Agencies') is visible and contains at least 8 specialized agency nodes.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the diagram as a PNG file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A draw.io export dialog saving 'un_org_chart.png' to the Desktop, or a file manager/desktop view showing the newly created 'un_org_chart.png' file.

integrity.description: Agent uses the draw.io graphical interface to build the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen dragging, dropping, and connecting shapes in the draw.io GUI, rather than writing XML code in a text editor or using a script to generate the .drawio file.

integrity.description: Agent uses the application's native export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu in draw.io, rather than using a CLI conversion tool or taking a manual screenshot and renaming it.

integrity.description: Agent does not paste a pre-computed XML string to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor should not show the agent pasting a massive, complete XML payload directly into 'un_org_chart.drawio'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 2-page draw.io diagram saved to ~/Desktop/un_org_chart.drawio and exported as ~/Desktop/un_org_chart.png. Page 1 must contain a 'United Nations' root node connected to exactly 6 principal organs (General Assembly, Security Council, ECOSOC, ICJ, Secretariat, Trusteeship Council), plus at least 9 subsidiary bodies (3 under GA, 2 under SC, 2 under ECOSOC, 2 Secretariat departments). Page 2 must contain at least 8 specialized agencies. The diagram must use at least 3 distinct fill colors to code the branches. The reference data is at ~/Desktop/un_system_reference.txt.
